qry:select.name: qry_legajo_a
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SDP01.d_localidad as localidad_residencia, SDP01.oi_localidad, LOC.d_localidad, ORG35.d_provincia as provincia_residencia, ORG35PA.d_pais as pais_residencia, ORG22.d_estado_civil, SDP01.d_apellido, SDP01.d_nombres, SDP01.c_nro_doc, SDP01.c_sexo, SDP01.f_nacim, SDP01.c_nro_cuil, SDP01.d_email, SDP01.c_pais_cel, SDP01.c_area_cel, SDP01.te_celular, SDP01.c_codigo_postal, SDP01.d_calle, SDP01.c_nro, SDP01.c_piso, SDP01.c_departamento, SDP01.c_pais, SDP01.c_area, SDP01.te_nro, SDP01.oi_foto, SDP01.oi_doc_digital, SDP02.o_doc_digital, SDP01.c_viajar as c_viajar, SDP01.c_radicarse as c_radicarse, SDP01.c_vehiculo, SDP01.c_lic_conduc, SDP16.d_tipo_jor_lab, SDP17.d_sit_laboral, SDP01.n_remuneracion, SDP01.oi_cv, DOC.c_tipo_documento, SDP01.t_cv, SDP01.f_actualizacion, SDP01.oi_personal FROM SDP01_CV AS SDP01, ORG22_EST_CIVIL AS ORG22, ORG35_PROVINCIAS AS ORG35, ORG35_PAISES AS ORG35PA, SDP02_DOC_DIG as SDP02, SDP16_TIPOS_JORNADA AS SDP16, SDP17_SIT_LABORALES AS SDP17, PER20_TIPOS_DOC AS DOC, ORG19_LOCALIDADES AS LOC JOIN SDP01.oi_estado_civil LEFT OUTER ORG22.oi_estado_civil, ORG35.oi_provincia RIGHT OUTER SDP01.oi_provincia, ORG35PA.oi_pais RIGHT OUTER SDP01.oi_pais, SDP02.oi_doc_digital RIGHT OUTER SDP01.oi_foto, SDP01.oi_tipo_jor_lab LEFT OUTER SDP16.oi_tipo_jor_lab, SDP01.oi_sit_laboral LEFT OUTER SDP17.oi_sit_laboral, SDP01.oi_tipo_documento INNER DOC.oi_tipo_documento, SDP01.oi_localidad LEFT OUTER LOC.oi_localidad WHERE SDP01.oi_cv = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_domicilio
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER09_TIPOS_DOMIC.d_tipo_domicilio, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.d_localidad, PER01_DOMIC_PER.d_calle, PER01_DOMIC_PER.e_numero, PER01_DOMIC_PER.d_piso, PER01_DOMIC_PER.d_departamento, PER01_DOMIC_PER.te_1 FROM PER01_DOMIC_PER, PER01_PERSONAL, ORG19_LOCALIDADES, PER09_TIPOS_DOMIC, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN PER01_DOMIC_PER.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER09_TIPOS_DOMIC.oi_tipo_domicilio INNER PER01_DOMIC_PER.oi_tipo_domicilio, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal INNER PER01_DOMIC_PER.oi_personal, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_localidad RIGHT OUTER PER01_DOMIC_PER.oi_localidad, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_estudios
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT ORG43.d_area_est as d_area_est, org35.d_pais as d_pais, PER12.d_nivel_estudio as d_nivel_estudio, SDP01.c_estado, SDP01.d_otro_est_educ as d_otro_est_educ, SDP01.f_actualiz as f_actualiz, SDP01.o_estudio as o_estudio, SDP01.d_localidad, SDP01.d_institucion, SDP01.d_nom_carrera, EST.d_estudio
FROM SDP01_ESTUDIOS_CV AS SDP01, SDP01_CV AS CV, PER12_NIVELES_EST AS PER12, ORG35_PAISES AS ORG35, ORG43_AREAS_EST AS ORG43, ORG35_PROVINCIAS AS PROV, ORG11_ESTUDIOS AS EST JOIN SDP01.oi_area_est LEFT OUTER ORG43.oi_area_est, SDP01.oi_nivel_estudio LEFT OUTER PER12.oi_nivel_estudio, CV.oi_cv LEFT OUTER SDP01.oi_cv, SDP01.oi_estudio LEFT OUTER EST.oi_estudio, CV.oi_provincia LEFT OUTER PROV.oi_provincia, PROV.oi_pais LEFT OUTER ORG35.oi_pais WHERE SDP01.oi_cv = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_idiomas
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SDP01.c_nivel_habla as Habla, SDP01.c_nivel_lee as Lee, SDP01.c_nivel_escribe as Escribe, ORG20.d_idioma AS d_idioma FROM SDP01_IDIOMAS_CV AS SDP01, ORG20_IDIOMAS AS ORG20 JOIN ORG20.oi_idioma RIGHT OUTER SDP01.oi_idioma WHERE SDP01.oi_cv = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_experiencias
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SDP01.d_empresa, SDP01.f_ingreso, SDP01.f_egreso, EXP.d_puesto_exp, SDP01.o_contacto, SDP01.d_actividad, SDP01.l_per_cargo, SDP01.n_ultimo_sueldo, SDP01.e_experiencia, SDP01.o_tareas, SDP01.d_localidad, AEXP.d_area_exp FROM SDP01_EXPERIENCIA AS SDP01, SDP09_PUESTO_EXP AS EXP, SDP18_AREAS_EXP AS AEXP JOIN SDP01.oi_puesto_exp LEFT OUTER EXP.oi_puesto_exp, SDP01.oi_area_exp LEFT OUTER AEXP.oi_area_exp WHERE SDP01.oi_cv = {#PARAM:@id} ORDER BY f_ingreso ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_conocimientos
qry_postulaciones
qry_areasinteres
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SDP09_AREAS.d_area FROM SDP01_AREAS_CV, SDP09_AREAS JOIN SDP09_AREAS.oi_area INNER SDP01_AREAS_CV.oi_area WHERE SDP01_AREAS_CV.oi_cv= {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: EXAMENES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT EXA.f_examen, EXA.d_resultado, EXA.n_valor, EXA.t_comentario, EXAMEN.d_examen, EXA.oi_recluta_exa FROM SDP14_RECLUTA_EXA AS EXA, SDP12_EXAMENES AS EXAMEN JOIN EXA.oi_examen INNER EXAMEN.oi_examen WHERE EXA.oi_reclutado = {#PARAM:@oi_reclutado} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_logo
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_logotipo, PER19_IMAGENES.o_imagen FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER19_IMAGENES JOIN ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_logotipo LEFT OUTER PER19_IMAGENES.oi_imagen_per WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RECLUTADOS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT REC.oi_cv, REC.oi_aviso, REC.f_estado, REC.oi_reclutado,
REC.n_merito FROM SDP14_RECLUTADOS AS REC WHERE REC.oi_cv = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: INFORMES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SDP14_RECLUTA_INF.f_informe, SDP14_RECLUTA_INF.o_informe, SDP22_INFORMES.d_informe, SDP22_TIPOS_INFORMES.d_tipo_informe FROM SDP14_RECLUTA_INF, SDP22_INFORMES, SDP22_TIPOS_INFORMES JOIN SDP14_RECLUTA_INF.oi_informe INNER SDP22_INFORMES.oi_informe, SDP22_INFORMES.oi_tipo_informe INNER SDP22_TIPOS_INFORMES.oi_tipo_informe WHERE SDP14_RECLUTA_INF.oi_reclutado = {#PARAM:@oi_reclutado} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: REFERENCIAS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SDP14_RECLUTA_REF.f_referencia, SDP14_RECLUTA_REF.o_referencia, SDP23_REFERENCIAS.d_referencia, SDP23_TIPOS_REF.d_tipo_ref FROM SDP14_RECLUTA_REF, SDP23_REFERENCIAS, SDP23_TIPOS_REF JOIN SDP14_RECLUTA_REF.oi_referencia INNER SDP23_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia, SDP23_REFERENCIAS.oi_tipo_ref INNER SDP23_TIPOS_REF.oi_tipo_ref WHERE SDP14_RECLUTA_REF.oi_reclutado = {#PARAM:@oi_reclutado} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: OBSERVACIONES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SDP14_RECLUTA_OBS.f_observacion, SDP14_RECLUTA_OBS.o_observacion FROM SDP14_RECLUTA_OBS WHERE SDP14_RECLUTA_OBS.oi_reclutado = {#PARAM:@oi_reclutado} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ENTREVISTAS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT ENTREV.f_entrevista, ENTREV.d_entrevistador, ENTREV.n_valor, ENTREV.t_comentario, E.d_entrevista, TIPO.d_tipo_entrevista FROM SDP14_RECLUTA_ENTREV AS ENTREV, SDP13_ENTREVISTAS AS E, SDP13_TIPOS_ENTREVISTAS AS TIPO JOIN ENTREV.oi_entrevista INNER E.oi_entrevista, TIPO.oi_tipo_entrevista INNER E.oi_tipo_entrevista WHERE ENTREV.oi_reclutado = {#PARAM:@oi_reclutado} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: AVISOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT AVISO.c_aviso, AVISO.d_puesto, REC.c_estado FROM SDP05_AVISOS AS AVISO, SDP14_RECLUTADOS AS REC JOIN REC.oi_aviso INNER AVISO.oi_aviso WHERE AVISO.oi_aviso = {#PARAM:@oi_aviso} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_legajo_empresa
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02.e_numero_legajo, PER02.f_ingreso, ORG03.d_empresa FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, ORG03_EMPRESAS AS ORG03 JOIN PER02.oi_empresa INNER ORG03.oi_empresa WHERE PER02.oi_personal = {#PARAM:@oi_personal} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_foto_per
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER01.oi_foto FROM PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01 WHERE PER01.oi_personal = {#PARAM:@oi_personal} ')/ROWS/ROW

table.style: margin-left:15px;font-size: 11px; color: rgb(24, 65, 99); font-family: Arial; font-weight: 400; height: 30px;
font-size: 11px; color: rgb(24, 65, 99); font-family: Arial; font-weight: 400; height: 30px;

b.xsl:text: Dispuesto a radicarse en otra ciudad?:
